data.text: I VISITED HERE HAVING SEEN A PICTURE TAKEN BY ANOTHER STARDRIFTER LONG
AGO; TO MY SURPRISE, THE SURFACE OF THE PLANET NOW APPEARS ENTIRELY
DIFFERENT, THOUGH I AM CERTAIN IT IS THE RIGHT PLACE. FROM SPACE, THE
WAY THIS PLANET LOOKS REMINDS ME OF A PLANET I SAW IN A DREAM ONCE;
THIS IS WHAT I HAVE NAMED IT AFTER, AS THE PLANET'S PHOTOGRAPHER HAS
EITHER NOT NAMED IT OR NOT UPLOADED IT TO THE DATABASE. (TWOTWOS, 6012:
